asset_type: Product-led TaraHome technical blog cover for a Google TV Streamer and Home Assistant compatibility guide

input_image.product: Google TV Streamer (4K) with Voice Remote

prompt:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: product-led TaraHome technical blog cover for a compatibility guide, suitable for centered 16:9 card and 16:10 article crops
Input images: Image 1 is the edit target and an official Google product photograph of the real Google TV Streamer (4K) and its real remote
Primary request: preserve the Google TV Streamer body and remote exactly as photographed, including their shapes, dimensions, button layout, material, color, shadows, and physical proportions; change only the surrounding residential styling so the image feels native to TaraHome
Scene/backdrop: retain the warm natural-oak console and quiet off-white wall; make the top book beneath the vase a restrained dark forest green instead of pink, and gently warm the overall late-afternoon color balance
Style/medium: high-end natural editorial product photography, physically believable and understated
Composition/framing: wide full-bleed landscape; keep the real Streamer and remote inside the central 70 percent so both centered 16:9 and 16:10 crops retain them; keep the vase and console as supporting context
Lighting/mood: soft natural residential window light, calm and practical
Color palette: warm oak, cream, porcelain white, restrained dark green
Constraints: change only the book color and ambient color grade; preserve the actual Google TV Streamer and remote without redesigning, moving, relabeling, adding, or removing any hardware detail; no added devices; no text; no watermark
Avoid: invented hardware, altered remote buttons, logos added or removed, embedded headline/title poster, diagrams, charts, graphs, arrows, decorative routing/network/path line overlays, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, badges, neon, fake screens, generic AI smart-home imagery
